title: Fix AC1 alignment range/display inconsistency in Evaluation

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Verified issue: AC1 storage/display path is inconsistent (raw [-1,1] at add, asymmetric scaling fallback path). Implementing unified mapping to legacy-compatible range for metric payloads and verifying check_report.py remains removed/ignored.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Fixed AC1 metric inconsistency: keep native AC1 internally, convert to legacy-compatible percentage payload via Evaluation._format_alignment_metric_value() for all Alignment metric write paths (primary, forced-add, and default metrics). Verified check_report.py is absent and ignored via .gitignore.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Validation: .venv/bin/pytest -q tests/cli/test_evaluation_scoreversion_association.py -k AlignmentFormatting -> 4 passed (18 deselected). Full file run shows 2 pre-existing environment-dependent failures requiring account_key, unrelated to this change.
